scripts.build: bun run --cwd packages/ticktick-unofficial build && bun run --cwd apps/ticktick-unofficial-api build && bun run --cwd apps/ticktick-unofficial-cli build
scripts.typecheck: bun run --cwd packages/ticktick-unofficial typecheck && bun run --cwd apps/ticktick-unofficial-api typecheck && bun run --cwd apps/ticktick-unofficial-cli typecheck
